name: Administrators
description: Full access to manage users, organizations, and system configurations.

name: Editors
description: Can create and edit content, but cannot manage system-level settings.

name: Viewers
description: Read-only access to dashboards, reports, and public resources.

name: Contributors
description: Can add and update datasets but requires approval for publishing.

name: Analysts
description: Specialized group for data analysis, reporting, and insights.
